meaning: n.浮质(气体中的悬浮微粒,如烟,雾等),[化]气溶胶,气雾剂,烟雾剂
examples: The concept of releasing aerosol sprays into the stratosphere above the Arctic has been proposed by several scientists.
By 1978, the use of CFCs in aerosol propellants was banned.
The mission will also observe clouds and aerosol particles in the troposphere.
The challenge of transforming the powder into an aerosol cloud was handed to rocket scientist Carlos Schuler.
At 16, he spent three months on the streets where he began painting with aerosol cans.
